stages.name: targeted_unit_tests
stages.evidence: zir_backend_test proves the ZIR prototype re-tags exactly-mapped AST condition candidates as backend=zir/backend_stability=experimental with source parity (span/operator/original/replacement) and a distinct durable id, records arithmetic/literal operators as out-of-report ZNTL_ZIR_UNSUPPORTED diagnostics (never mutants), and serializes them byte-exact to the committed artifact; cli_backend_experiment_test proves list-mutants --backend parses ast/zir/air and rejects unknown, ZIR requires explicit experimental config opt-in (ZNTL_CONFIG_EXPERIMENTAL_BACKEND), generateExperimental is rejected without opt-in and accepted with it, air is BackendNotImplemented (owned by 057), and AST stays the unaffected default; full suite green

stages.name: parity_tests
stages.evidence: For comparison operators the ZIR candidate equals the AST candidate on span/operator/original/replacement, differing only in backend, backend_stability, backend_version, and the derived id; the re-tagged candidate is still a structurally valid candidate

stages.name: cli_smoke
stages.evidence: list-mutants --backend zir without config opt-in exits 2 with ZNTL_CONFIG_EXPERIMENTAL_BACKEND, --backend air exits 2 as not-implemented (owned by 057), --backend bogus exits 2 with ZNTL_CLI_INVALID_OPTION, and the default AST backend still lists mutants (269 over src/) unaffected

stages.name: mutation_checks
stages.reason: self-mutation dogfood is gated to the Phase 5/7 stages (task 085); the ZIR prototype is deterministic and covered by unit and parity tests, and it is opt-in only so it never affects stable AST dogfood defaults

residual_risk: The ZIR prototype is a deterministic adapter that derives candidates from the AST candidate set (so source mapping is exact by construction) rather than introspecting real Zig ZIR via compiler internals; live compiler-internal ZIR extraction is intentionally out of scope (docs/ZIR_BACKEND.md) and gated behind future stabilization.

The supported-operator set is the condition operators (comparison/logical/boolean); arithmetic and literal operators are recorded as out-of-report diagnostics until a future task adds exact type-level ZIR source mapping.
project discovery globs determine which files reach any backend; this is unchanged by task 056 and the ZIR path returns exactly what the AST path would for the same discovered files.
